---
title: "Multivariate G-Theory Verification: Drug-Review (4-aspect)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(lme4); library(dplyr); library(tibble); library(tidyr); library(knitr); library(numDeriv)
ROOT <- "/Users/veronica/Claude/01. Research"
setwd(ROOT)
source("multivariate/src/shared/multivariate_workflow.R")
```

# Load Model & Data

```{r load}
env <- new.env(); load("multivariate/outputs/lme4/drug_review_results.RData", envir = env)
all_models <- env$results
fit <- all_models$nested_seed_temperature$fit

dat <- mg_prepare_multivariate_data(task = "drug_review", data_path = "data/drug_labeling_final.csv")
traits <- levels(dat$trait)
n_m <- nlevels(dat$evaluator); n_p <- nlevels(dat$prompt_type)
n_t <- nlevels(dat$temperature); n_s <- nlevels(dat$seed)
cat(sprintf("Traits (%d): %s\n", length(traits), paste(traits, collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Design: %d items x %dx%dx%dx%d = %d rows\n",
            nlevels(dat$item_id), n_m, n_p, n_t, n_s, nrow(dat)))
```

# BIC Model Comparison

```{r bic}
bic_tbl <- bind_rows(lapply(names(all_models), function(nm) {
  m <- all_models[[nm]]
  if (is.null(m$fit)) return(NULL)
  tibble(Model = nm, BIC = BIC(m$fit), AIC = AIC(m$fit),
         logLik = as.numeric(logLik(m$fit)), Singular = isSingular(m$fit))
}))
kable(bic_tbl, digits = 1, caption = "Model comparison by BIC")
```

# Per-Trait Variance Components

```{r varcomp}
comp_tbl <- mg_multivariate_component_table(fit, traits = traits)
ct_wide <- comp_tbl %>%
  select(component, trait, variance) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = trait, values_from = variance, values_fill = 0)
kable(ct_wide, digits = 6, caption = "Per-trait variance components")
```

# Per-Trait G-Coefficients — Recomputed

```{r per-trait-g}
trait_g <- mg_predict_multivariate_g(fit, dat, n_m, n_p, n_t, n_s)

trait_phi <- bind_rows(lapply(traits, function(tr) {
  st <- mg_get_trait_component_variance(comp_tbl, tr, "item_id")
  sd <- mg_get_trait_component_variance(comp_tbl, tr, "item_id:evaluator") / n_m +
    mg_get_trait_component_variance(comp_tbl, tr, "item_id:prompt_type") / n_p +
    mg_get_trait_component_variance(comp_tbl, tr, "Residual") / (n_m*n_p*n_t*n_s)
  sa <- mg_get_trait_component_variance(comp_tbl, tr, "evaluator") / n_m +
    mg_get_trait_component_variance(comp_tbl, tr, "prompt_type") / n_p +
    mg_get_trait_component_variance(comp_tbl, tr, "evaluator:prompt_type") / (n_m*n_p) +
    mg_get_trait_component_variance(comp_tbl, tr, "evaluator:prompt_type:temperature") / (n_m*n_p*n_t) +
    mg_get_trait_component_variance(comp_tbl, tr, "evaluator:prompt_type:temperature:seed") / (n_m*n_p*n_t*n_s)
  tibble(trait = tr, Phi = st / (st + sd + sa))
}))

trait_tbl <- trait_g %>% rename(Erho2 = predicted_g) %>% left_join(trait_phi, by = "trait")
kable(trait_tbl, digits = 4, caption = "Per-trait G-coefficients (observed design)")
```

# Composite G-Coefficients — Recomputed

```{r composite}
comp_w <- mg_composite_weights(comp_tbl, traits, n_m, n_p, n_t, n_s)
eq_g <- mg_composite_g_from_weights(comp_w$equal, comp_tbl, traits, n_m, n_p, n_t, n_s)
opt_g <- mg_composite_g_from_weights(comp_w$optimal, comp_tbl, traits, n_m, n_p, n_t, n_s)

# Holistic univariate baseline
uv_env <- new.env(); load("univariate/outputs/lme4/drug_review_results.RData", envir = uv_env)
uv_fit <- uv_env$results$nested_seed_temperature$fit
uv_dat <- mg_prepare_univariate_data(task = "drug_review", data_path = "data/drug_labeling_final.csv")
uv_erho2 <- mg_predict_univariate_g(uv_fit, uv_dat,
  nlevels(uv_dat$evaluator), nlevels(uv_dat$prompt_type),
  nlevels(uv_dat$temperature), nlevels(uv_dat$seed))

comp_g_tbl <- tibble(
  Weighting = c("Equal", "Optimal", "Holistic (univariate)"),
  Erho2_c = c(eq_g$erho2_c, opt_g$erho2_c, uv_erho2),
  Phi_c = c(eq_g$phi_c, opt_g$phi_c, NA)
)
kable(comp_g_tbl, digits = 4, caption = "Composite G-coefficients")

cat("\nOptimal weights:\n")
w_sorted <- sort(comp_w$optimal, decreasing = TRUE)
for (nm in names(w_sorted)) cat(sprintf("  %s = %.3f\n", nm, w_sorted[nm]))
cat(sprintf("\nHolistic - Optimal = %.4f (holistic advantage)\n", uv_erho2 - opt_g$erho2_c))
```

# Disattenuated Correlations — Recomputed

```{r disattenuated}
re <- ranef(fit)$item_id

# Debug: show all column names in ranef to verify mapping
cat("All ranef(fit)$item_id column names:\n")
cat(paste(names(re), collapse = "\n"), "\n\n")

trait_cols <- grep("^trait_", names(re), value = TRUE)
cat("Trait columns selected:\n")
cat(paste(trait_cols, collapse = "\n"), "\n\n")

blup_mat <- as.matrix(re[, trait_cols])
colnames(blup_mat) <- sub("^trait_", "", colnames(blup_mat))
cat("BLUP matrix column names after renaming:\n")
cat(paste(colnames(blup_mat), collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

# Show first 5 items to verify values make sense
cat("First 5 items' BLUPs:\n")
print(round(head(blup_mat, 5), 4))

blup_cor <- cor(blup_mat, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
cat("\nRaw correlation matrix (before reordering):\n")
print(round(blup_cor, 3))

# Generate heatmap figure
library(ggplot2)
dir.create(file.path(ROOT, "Figures"), showWarnings = FALSE)

pretty_names <- c(efficacy="Efficacy", safety="Safety", burden="Burden", cost="Cost")
display_cor <- blup_cor
colnames(display_cor) <- pretty_names[colnames(display_cor)]
rownames(display_cor) <- pretty_names[rownames(display_cor)]
fig_order <- c("Efficacy", "Safety", "Burden", "Cost")
display_cor <- display_cor[fig_order, fig_order]
kable(round(display_cor, 3), caption = "Disattenuated correlations (from item BLUPs; reordered for figure display)")

# Build lower triangle explicitly, including the diagonal
pairs <- list(); idx <- 1
for (i in seq_along(fig_order)) {
  for (j in seq_len(i)) {
    pairs[[idx]] <- data.frame(
      yvar = fig_order[i], xvar = fig_order[j],
      val = display_cor[fig_order[i], fig_order[j]],
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    idx <- idx + 1
  }
}
plot_data <- do.call(rbind, pairs)
plot_data$yvar <- factor(plot_data$yvar, levels = fig_order)
plot_data$xvar <- factor(plot_data$xvar, levels = fig_order)

p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = xvar, y = yvar, fill = val)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", val)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#2166AC", mid = "#F7F7F7", high = "#B2182B",
                       midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1), name = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.key.height = unit(2, "cm"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13, face = "italic")) +
  ggtitle("Drug-Review: Aspect-level ratings")

ggsave(file.path(ROOT, "Figures/dr_disattenuated_correlations.png"),
       p, width = 5.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
p
```

# Wald CIs — Recomputed

```{r wald}
theta <- getME(fit, "theta"); sig <- sigma(fit)
vc_templ <- as.data.frame(VarCorr(fit))
n_theta <- length(theta)

# Build component table from theta (handles || model VarCorr structure)
build_ct_from_theta <- function(th, s, vt, tr) {
  rand_rows <- vt[is.na(vt$var2) & vt$grp != "Residual", ]
  new_var <- th^2 * s^2
  canonicalize <- function(x) { x <- sub("\\.[0-9]+$", "", x); gsub("\\.", ":", x) }
  rand_tbl <- tibble(trait = sub("^trait_", "", rand_rows$var1),
                     component = canonicalize(rand_rows$grp),
                     variance = new_var[seq_len(nrow(rand_rows))])
  resid_tbl <- tibble(trait = tr, component = "Residual", variance = rep(s^2, length(tr)))
  bind_rows(rand_tbl, resid_tbl) %>%
    mutate(facet_group = mg_map_multivariate_facet_group(component),
           component_type = case_when(
             component == "item_id" ~ "object_of_measurement",
             grepl("^item_id:", component) ~ "item_interaction",
             component == "Residual" ~ "residual", TRUE ~ "facet_component")) %>%
    group_by(trait) %>% mutate(prop_total = variance / sum(variance)) %>% ungroup()
}

phi_fn <- function(th) {
  ct <- build_ct_from_theta(th, sig, vc_templ, traits)
  pvec <- .mg_per_trait_variances(ct, traits, n_m, n_p, n_t, n_s)
  erho2_trait <- pvec$tau / (pvec$tau + pvec$delta)
  phi_trait <- pvec$tau / (pvec$tau + pvec$delta + pvec$abs_extra)
  K <- length(traits); w_eq <- rep(1/K, K)
  snr <- ifelse(pvec$delta > 0, pvec$tau / pvec$delta, 0)
  w_opt <- if (sum(snr) > 0) snr / sum(snr) else w_eq
  c(setNames(phi_trait, paste0("phi_", traits)),
    setNames(erho2_trait, paste0("erho2_", traits)),
    phi_composite_eq = sum(w_eq^2*pvec$tau) / (sum(w_eq^2*pvec$tau) + sum(w_eq^2*pvec$delta) + sum(w_eq^2*pvec$abs_extra)),
    erho2_composite_eq = sum(w_eq^2*pvec$tau) / (sum(w_eq^2*pvec$tau) + sum(w_eq^2*pvec$delta)),
    phi_composite_opt = sum(w_opt^2*pvec$tau) / (sum(w_opt^2*pvec$tau) + sum(w_opt^2*pvec$delta) + sum(w_opt^2*pvec$abs_extra)),
    erho2_composite_opt = sum(w_opt^2*pvec$tau) / (sum(w_opt^2*pvec$tau) + sum(w_opt^2*pvec$delta)))
}

# Hessian
ctrl <- lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 100000))
dd <- lmer(formula(fit), data = fit@frame, REML = FALSE, control = ctrl, devFunOnly = TRUE)
eps <- 1e-4; d0 <- dd(theta)
diag_H <- sapply(seq_len(n_theta), function(i) {
  th_p <- th_m <- theta; th_p[i] <- theta[i]+eps; th_m[i] <- theta[i]-eps
  (dd(th_p) + dd(th_m) - 2*d0) / eps^2
})
H <- diag(diag_H, nrow = n_theta)
V_theta <- tryCatch(2 * solve(H), error = function(e) 2 * MASS::ginv(H))

pt <- phi_fn(theta)
J <- numDeriv::jacobian(phi_fn, theta)
V_out <- J %*% V_theta %*% t(J)
se <- sqrt(pmax(diag(V_out), 0)); z <- qnorm(0.975)
kable(tibble(Parameter = names(pt), Point = round(pt,4), SE = round(se,4),
             Lower = round(pt-z*se,4), Upper = round(pt+z*se,4)),
      caption = "Analytic Wald 95% CIs (delta method)")
```

# Bootstrap CIs — Loaded

```{r bootstrap}
wald_file <- "multivariate/outputs/lme4/drug_review_wald_ci.RData"
if (file.exists(wald_file)) {
  we <- new.env(); load(wald_file, envir = we)
  for (nm in ls(we)) {
    obj <- get(nm, envir = we)
    if (is.data.frame(obj) || is_tibble(obj)) {
      print(kable(obj, digits = 4, caption = paste("Stored bootMer Wald CIs:", nm)))
    } else if (is.list(obj)) {
      for (sub in names(obj)) {
        so <- obj[[sub]]
        if (is.data.frame(so) || is_tibble(so)) print(kable(so, digits = 4, caption = sub))
      }
    }
  }
} else { cat("No stored bootstrap Wald CI file found.\n") }
```

# D-Study Projections — Recomputed

```{r dstudy}
designs <- tribble(
  ~scenario, ~nE, ~nP, ~nT, ~nS,
  "A: Minimal (1x1x1x1)",1,1,1,1, "B: 1x3",1,3,1,1, "C: 2x1",2,1,1,1,
  "D: Current (4x3x6x3)",4,3,6,3, "E: 3x2",3,2,1,1, "F: 4x3x1x1",4,3,1,1,
  "G: 2x3x3x1",2,3,3,1, "H: 6x3x1x1",6,3,1,1, "I: 4x5x1x1",4,5,1,1)
ds <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(designs)), function(i) {
  d <- designs[i,]
  tg <- mg_predict_multivariate_g(fit, dat, d$nE, d$nP, d$nT, d$nS)
  cw <- mg_composite_weights(comp_tbl, traits, d$nE, d$nP, d$nT, d$nS)
  eq <- mg_composite_g_from_weights(cw$equal, comp_tbl, traits, d$nE, d$nP, d$nT, d$nS)
  op <- mg_composite_g_from_weights(cw$optimal, comp_tbl, traits, d$nE, d$nP, d$nT, d$nS)
  row <- tibble(Scenario=d$scenario, nE=d$nE, nP=d$nP,
                Eq_Erho2=round(eq$erho2_c,4), Opt_Erho2=round(op$erho2_c,4))
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(tg))) row[[tg$trait[j]]] <- round(tg$predicted_g[j], 4)
  row
}))
kable(ds, caption = "D-Study projections")
```

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
